subcodes.first_line: Rest not, even for an instant, and seek not comfort, even for a moment; rather labour with heart and soul that thou mayest render devoted service
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق تا توانی بخدمت احبای الهی پرداز زیرا خدمت احباء بندگی درگاه حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
